page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: De novo assembly of highly repetitive regions
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A local assembly algorithm designed for short-reads from NGS platforms such as Illumina. The reads must come from two libraries: one short insert, and one long insert.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A local assembly algorithm designed for short-reads from NGS platforms such as Illumina. The reads must come from two libraries: one short insert, and one long insert.
